query:
SELECT '客戶' AS 資料類型, COUNT(*) AS 筆數 FROM clients
UNION ALL
SELECT '員工', COUNT(*) FROM workers
UNION ALL
SELECT '需求單', COUNT(*) FROM demands
UNION ALL
SELECT '指派記錄', COUNT(*) FROM assignments;

-- 確認保留的客戶是正確的
SELECT id, name, contactName, status, createdAt FROM clients;
